description: The high-power certification rocket at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/avbay_base.ork needs its avionics bay explicitly modeled to satisfy safety review board requirements regarding pitch/yaw moment of inertia. Model the avionics bay internals within the middle body tube section by adding two 6mm thick Plywood or Birch Bulkheads (one forward, one aft) and three Mass Components: 'Altimeter Sled' (40g, 150mm), 'Flight Computer' (15g, 50mm), and 'Avionics Battery' (80g, 70mm). Verify stability via flight simulation and save the design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/detailed_avbay_rocket.ork. Write a technical summary report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/avbay_report.txt including the total rocket mass, CG location, stability margin, and simulated apogee.
